summary: Epic small‑venue show despite Jerry’s illness, captured in an enjoyable recording.
review: The concert is remembered as a legendary performance – the tiny venue and palpable tension from Jerry’s sickly condition made for an intense atmosphere that many fans call epic. No specific audio issues were noted, so the recording is assumed to be listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review; strong positive sentiment about the show but no concrete details on audio quality, leading to a cautious high rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on soundboard, clarity, or mix; absence of complaints suggests the recording is at least listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Intimate setting with heightened tension due to Jerry’s health, creating a uniquely epic experience despite the band’s frustration.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as very sickly; his condition created palpable tension.
